_comment: Example goals for testing the unified-orchestrator-v2. Each entry shows the goal and which paradigm shifts it exercises.

examples.goal: Classify customer support tickets by urgency with 95% accuracy and under 500ms response time
examples.notes: Good baseline goal. Run 3+ cycles to activate meta-learning (Shift 2).

examples.goal: Classify customer service requests by priority with 90% accuracy
examples.notes: Similar to EG-001. After EG-001 has run, this will trigger cross-goal transfer (Shift 4).

examples.goal: Process and route inbound email with 99.9% accuracy and zero data loss
examples.notes: 99.9% accuracy is intentionally hard to achieve. Run 3+ cycles to trigger auto-respecification (Shift 3).

examples.goal: Generate weekly marketing performance reports with 100% data accuracy
examples.notes: 100% accuracy will trigger auto-respecification after 3 failures.

examples.goal: Summarize weekly marketing analytics with high accuracy
examples.notes: Similar to EG-004. Will trigger cross-goal transfer after EG-004 has run.

quick_start.single_cycle: python pipeline.py --goal "Classify customer support tickets by urgency with 95% accuracy"
quick_start.multi_cycle: python pipeline.py --goal "Classify customer support tickets by urgency with 95% accuracy" --cycles 5
